# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-a-server
  namespace: namespace-a
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-a
  service:
    port: 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-b-server
  namespace: namespace-b
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-b
  service:
    port: 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-a-auth
  namespace: namespace-a
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: service-a-server
    namespace: namespace-a
  allowedServices:
  - namespace: namespace-b
    name: service-b
  port: 8080
  serviceAccounts:
  - name: service-b-sa
    namespace: namespace-b
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-b-auth
  namespace: namespace-b
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: service-b-server
    namespace: namespace-b
  allowedServices:
  - namespace: namespace-a
    name: service-a
  port: 8080
  serviceAccounts:
  - name: service-a-sa
    namespace: namespace-a
